Systemadministration & Infrastruktur.name: BTPS-SecPack
Systemadministration & Infrastruktur.description: This repository contains a collection of PowerShell tools that can be utilized to protect and defend an environment based on the recommendations of multiple cyber security researchers at Microsoft. These tools were created with a small to medium size enterprise environment in mind as smaller organizations do not always have the type of funding available to overly spend on security. The goal of this project is to help add value to an smaller organizations security by creating more visibility for the average IT Administrator. Organizations with 1,000’s of devices may find that this entire suite does not apply to them.

Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.name: toktoken
Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.description: TokToken is a fast, single-binary C codebase indexer for AI coding agents. Powered by universal-ctags and SQLite FTS5, it provides precise symbol search, dependency tracking, and an MCP server. TokToken reduces LLM context token usage by 88-99% by retrieving exact code symbols instead of reading entire files. Zero runtime dependencies.
Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.categorization_reason: Ein schneller C-Code-Indexer für KI-Coding-Agenten zur Reduzierung von Token-Nutzung.

Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.name: agent-toolkit
Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.description: A curated collection of skills for AI coding agents. Skills are packaged instructions and scripts that extend agent capabilities across development, documentation, planning, and professional workflows.
Entwicklungswerkzeuge & Frameworks.categorization_reason: Eine kuratierte Sammlung von Skills für KI-Coding-Agenten.

Sicherheit & Compliance.name: vibeguard
Sicherheit & Compliance.description: Native rules, hooks, and guards that prevent Claude Code and Codex from hallucinating code, duplicating files, or shipping unverified changes.
Sicherheit & Compliance.categorization_reason: Regeln und Guards, die verhindern, dass Claude Code und Codex Code halluzinieren oder unbestätigte Änderungen ausliefern.

Sicherheit & Compliance.name: Hardening-Audit-Tool-AuditTAP
Sicherheit & Compliance.description: FBPro Audit Test Automation Package allows you to create compliance reports for your systems. The resulting HTML-reports provide a transparent overview of your devices' security configuration compared to international security standards and hardening guides.
Sicherheit & Compliance.categorization_reason: Erstellt Compliance-Berichte für Systeme basierend auf internationalen Sicherheitsstandards.

Sicherheit & Compliance.name: kspec
Sicherheit & Compliance.description: A modern, extensible framework for defining and enforcing security policies across your digital infrastructure.
Sicherheit & Compliance.categorization_reason: Ein modernes, erweiterbares Framework zur Definition und Durchsetzung von Sicherheitsrichtlinien.

Sicherheit & Compliance.name: mergen
Sicherheit & Compliance.description: Mergen is an open-source, native macOS application for auditing and checking the security of your MacOS.
Sicherheit & Compliance.categorization_reason: Eine native macOS-Anwendung zur Überprüfung der Sicherheit von macOS.
